# هابي فارم — Happy Farm

> Egyptian brand specializing in 100% natural spices and seasonings. Direct-to-consumer delivery in Alexandria, Egypt. Wholesale supply available for restaurants, cafes, and food distributors across Egypt.

## About

هابي فارم (Happy Farm) is an Egyptian food brand founded in Alexandria, Egypt. We produce and sell 19 premium natural spice products in distinctive black glass jars. All products are 100% natural with no artificial additives. We serve both individual consumers (D2C) and businesses (B2B) including restaurants, home kitchens, caterers, and wholesale distributors.

- Website: https://happy-farm.store
- Location: Alexandria (الإسكندرية), Egypt
- Phone / WhatsApp: +201556662920
- Email: happy.farm7890@gmail.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/happyfarm1/
- Social following: 59,000+ followers

## Products (19 SKUs)

All products are packaged in 50–70g glass jars. Prices include 14% VAT.

| Arabic Name       | English           | Weight | Price (EGP) |
|-------------------|-------------------|--------|-------------|
| كركم              | Turmeric          | 50g    | 36          |
| شطة               | Chili Pepper      | 50g    | 23          |
| كمون              | Cumin             | 50g    | 36          |
| بهارات 7          | 7-Spice Blend     | 50g    | 40          |
| فلفل أسمر         | Black Pepper      | 50g    | 43          |
| فلفل أبيض         | White Pepper      | 50g    | 80          |
| ثوم بودرة         | Garlic Powder     | 70g    | 32          |
| بصل بودر          | Onion Powder      | 50g    | 32          |
| كزبرة             | Coriander         | 50g    | 26          |
| قرفة              | Cinnamon          | 50g    | 46          |
| زعتر              | Thyme             | 25g    | 29          |
| حبة البركة        | Black Seed        | 50g    | 38          |
| بابريكا مدخنة     | Smoked Paprika    | 50g    | 40          |
| بهارات بطاطس      | Potato Spice Mix  | 50g    | 33          |
| مرقة دجاج         | Chicken Bouillon  | 70g    | 30          |
| مرقة لحم          | Beef Bouillon     | 70g    | 29          |
| محاشي             | Stuffed Veg. Mix  | 50g    | 29          |
| مشاوي             | Grilling Mix      | 50g    | 32          |
| كبدة              | Liver Spice Mix   | 50g    | 31          |

## Ordering (D2C)

- Minimum order: 6 bottles per order
- Delivery: Alexandria, Egypt only
- Payment: Vodafone Cash to 01556662920 (deposit required to confirm order)
- Order online at: https://happy-farm.store/#order
- Customer support via WhatsApp: https://wa.me/201556662920

## Wholesale / B2B

Happy Farm supplies restaurants, cafes, dark kitchens, catering companies, and retail distributors across Egypt. Wholesale pricing and bulk quantities available on request.

Contact for wholesale: +201556662920 (WhatsApp) or happy.farm7890@gmail.com

## Key Facts for Search & AI

- Category: Food / Spices / Seasonings
- Country: Egypt (مصر)
- City: Alexandria (الإسكندرية)
- Language: Arabic (primary), English (secondary)
- Business type: Food manufacturer + Direct-to-consumer + Wholesale distributor
- Certifications: 100% natural ingredients, no artificial additives
- Price range: 23–80 EGP per jar
- Founded: Alexandria, Egypt
